name: United Kingdom (Diplomatic Flag)

colors.symbolism: the blue of the Union Flag field
the central disc and the white of the Union Flag
the red of the Union Flag
the Royal Arms and surrounding garland

description: The Union Flag defaced in the centre with the Royal Arms of the United Kingdom on a white disc, encircled by a garland.
history: Flown by British ambassadors, ministers and chargés d'affaires over embassies and legations on prescribed days and when afloat. The defacement — the Royal Arms on a white roundel within a garland — distinguishes the diplomatic flag from the plain Union Flag and from consular flags (which bear a crown or the arms without the white disc).

features.symbolism: the Union Flag of the United Kingdom forms the field

features.role: white roundel behind the Royal Arms
Royal Arms of the United Kingdom within a garland
features.symbolism: the sovereign's arms, marking the diplomatic service
